message:
feat(wire-protocol): plumb dynamic tuning limits through distributed ingest

Previously the distributed ingest path baked in compile-time constants
`wire_protocol::MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE` / `MAX_SENDER_ID_LEN` at every call
site, leaving operators with no way to tune them from ft.toml even
though `[tuning.wire_protocol]` keys existed. This threads a caller-
provided `WireProtocolLimits` through the affected plumbing so runtime
tuning actually applies.

wire_protocol.rs
  - Impl `Default` for `WireProtocolLimits` (resolves from tuning → defaults)
  - Add `WireEnvelope::from_json_with_limits`; keep `from_json` as a
    default-limits shim so legacy callers still compile
  - Add `Aggregator::with_limits`, `with_limits_and_stale_after`, and
    persist the limits on the aggregator so per-message checks honor them

main.rs (distributed)
  - `DistributedIngestState::new` now takes limits and constructs the
    aggregator via `with_limits_and_stale_after`
  - `distributed_handle_connection` threads limits into `handshake` /
    `read_line` / `MessageSizeLimit` / `WireEnvelope::from_json_with_limits`
  - `distributed_sender_session_scope` now takes `max_sender_id_len`
    and gains UTF-8 safety: truncates at char boundaries + handles the
    suffix-longer-than-max edge case without panicking
  - Listener threads `connection_wire_limits` into each accepted socket

tuning_config.rs
  - New bounds `WireProtocolTuning::MIN_MAX_SENDER_ID_LEN = 32` (needed
    for distributed session-scoping replay-disambiguation suffixes) and
    `MAX_MAX_SENDER_ID_LEN = 4096` (prevents pathological identities)
  - `TuningConfig::validate` now emits errors for both bounds
  - Tests: upper-bound validation + extend the lower-bound assertion

config.rs
  - `Config::load_with_overrides` now runs `self.tuning.validate()` and
    surfaces its errors as `ValidationError`; previously malformed tuning
    survived load and failed loudly at runtime
  - New test `load_with_overrides_rejects_invalid_tuning_config`

docs/tuning-reference.md
  - Document the new max_sender_id_len validation bounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -241,6 +241,8 @@ These keys live under `[tuning.wire_protocol]`.
 Validation:
 - `max_message_size >= 65536` (`64 KiB`)
 - `max_message_size <= 67108864` (`64 MiB`)
+- `max_sender_id_len >= 32`
+- `max_sender_id_len <= 4096`
 
 ## `[tuning.ipc]`
